description: Pace v10 action registry — single source of truth for what the planner can emit AND what the Pace executor implements. Planner constrained-decodes against the per-action args schemas. Executor validates incoming payloads against the same.

actions.name: AX.press
actions.description: Click / press a UI element by its AX identifier or label

target.description: Element label (preferred — Pace resolves to AXUIElement) or stringified element_id

actions.name: AX.setValue
actions.description: Set the value of a text-bearing AX element (text field, text area, etc). Used for body streaming, edit, dictate-to-field.

target.description: Label or 'focused' to write into whatever has keyboard focus

range.description: Optional — replace only this range. Used by voice-edit on a selection.

actions.name: AX.scroll
actions.description: Scroll the focused scrollable element in a direction

actions.name: App.launch
actions.description: Launch an application (cold or warm activate)

actions.name: App.activate
actions.description: Bring an already-running application to the front without re-launching

actions.name: Mail.draft
actions.description: Open Mail compose window with To: / subject populated and stream the body in. Pace's body-streaming flow consumes this.

items.description: Email address OR an __resolve:<contact-name> token Pace looks up via Contacts

body.description: Compose body. Pace streams this into the compose window as it's emitted.

actions.name: Cal.event
actions.description: Create a calendar event via EventKit

start.description: ISO-8601 timestamp or natural-language ('tomorrow 3pm') that Pace resolves to ISO before dispatch

actions.name: Reminders.add
actions.description: Add a Reminder via EventKit. Different from Cal.event — no timeline, just a todo.

list.description: Reminders list name; defaults to user's default

actions.name: Notes.create
actions.description: Create a new Apple Note. No first-party API; Pace uses AppleScript (or in-process AX automation against Notes.app).

title.description: Optional title; inferred from first line if omitted

actions.name: Shortcut.run
actions.description: Run a user-installed Apple Shortcut by name. Last-mile fallback for things Pace doesn't have a first-class action for.

actions.name: Window.snap
actions.description: Snap the focused window to a screen position

actions.name: Clipboard.read
actions.description: Read the current pasteboard contents. Used when a Skill / question needs to operate on what's in the clipboard.
